name: Jimdo
description: Jimdo is a website builder platform that provides REST APIs for managing website content, blog posts, online store products, and customer data for small business websites. The platform offers AI-powered website creation tools, ecommerce capabilities, and developer integrations enabling businesses to build and manage their online presence programmatically.

itemOffered.name: Jimdo API
itemOffered.description: REST API for managing Jimdo website content, blog posts, online store products, orders, and customer data for small business websites built on the Jimdo platform.

blogPost.headline: BloC Architecture in Flutter: a Modern Architectural Approach and How We Use it at Jimdo
blogPost.description: Introduction to the BloC (Business Logic Component) architectural pattern for Flutter development and how Jimdo uses it.

blogPost.headline: Flutter at Jimdo: Our Experience and Fun Moments
blogPost.description: Jimdo's mobile team shares their experience adopting Flutter for cross-platform development of the Jimdo Boost app.

blogPost.headline: Container Based Crons at Jimdo
blogPost.description: How Jimdo implemented automated task scheduling using AWS CloudWatch Rules, ECS, SNS, SQS, and DynamoDB for containerized cron jobs.

blogPost.headline: HTTPS at Jimdo
blogPost.description: How Jimdo implemented HTTPS support across millions of user websites using Let's Encrypt, DynamoDB, and Redis-cached proxy nodes.

blogPost.headline: From "Voice and Tone" Guidelines to UI Animations
blogPost.description: How Jimdo applied brand voice and tone guidelines to inform UI animation design principles and timing.

blogPost.headline: How to get rid of waste
blogPost.description: Five strategies for eliminating waste in software development: work incrementally, complete or delete, write less code, offload tasks, and pair programming.

blogPost.headline: Put litter in its place
blogPost.description: Advocating for developers to regularly remove unnecessary code, features, and infrastructure to reduce complexity.

blogPost.headline: Simple service discovery using AWS Private Hosted Zones
blogPost.description: A cost-effective approach to service discovery using AWS Private Hosted Zones connected to VPCs, avoiding complex orchestration tools.

blogPost.headline: Fast feedback is everything
blogPost.description: How developers can enhance productivity by minimizing the time between code changes and test results through individual test execution, custom test runners, and editor shortcuts.
